title: oxybaphus nyctagineus
intro: Oxybaphus nyctagineus, also known as Night-flowering Four O'Clock, is a species of flowering plant in the Four O'Clock family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Oxybaphus nyctagineus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Oxybaphus nyctagineus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
